name: Frozen Kahlua Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Grease and flour bundt pan.
3. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add cocoa and egg yolks; mix well.
5. Dissolve baking soda in water, then combine with coffee, Kahlua, and add to batter alternately with flour. Mix gently.
6. Stir in vanilla and fold in beaten egg whites carefully.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan, removing any air bubbles.
8. Bake for 1 hour (or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean).
9. Combine powdered sugar and Kahlua for glaze; pour over warm cake.
10. Cover with foil and freeze until ready to serve.
11. About 1 hour before serving, remove from freezer and ice with whipped cream.
